title: How to join a Zoom meeting
description: Simple steps to connect to a Zoom video call with video and audio on your computer or phone.

steps.title: Find your invitation link
steps.body: Look inside your email or text messages for a blue web link that says 'Join Zoom Meeting' or starts with 'https://zoom.us/'.

steps.title: Click the link to open Zoom
steps.body: Click the link. If you do not have Zoom installed, follow the prompts on the screen to download the free Zoom software.

steps.title: Turn on your video
steps.body: When a box pops up asking for video access, click the button that says 'Join with Video'.

steps.title: Connect your computer sound
steps.body: Tap the button that says 'Join with Computer Audio' so you can hear others and speak through your microphone.

glossary.definition: A web address that opens the Zoom software and connects you to a specific video call room.
The system that links your computer's built-in microphone and speakers to the call.
